description.description: Human-readable summary of what the bundle ships.
description.title: Description

license.description: License identifier for the bundle's contents.
license.title: License

name.description: Bundle name; lowercase letters, digits, and internal hyphens. Combines with namespace to form the bundle's identity — never derived from the source URL.
name.title: Name

namespace.description: Maintainer branding for the bundle (org, handle, or umbrella); lowercase letters, digits, and internal hyphens. Combines with name to form the bundle's identity. Reserved namespaces (clawker, impersonation forms clawker-*/*-clawker, and official) are rejected.
namespace.title: Namespace

repository.description: URL of the bundle's source repository (informational).
repository.title: Repository

version.description: Bundle version used only for update change-detection (no compatibility semantics); when absent, the resolved source commit SHA is the version.
version.title: Version
